pi_items.source: Confirmed via VOLUME_PATH definition in both setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for veracrypt_env decommission_encrypted_volume task by verifying the setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts. Confirmed the task dynamically generates a synthetic VeraCrypt volume populated with sample files. All metadata claims exactly match the scripts: target volume path '/home/ga/Volumes/data_volume.hc', expected files 'SF312_Nondisclosure_Agreement.txt', 'FY2024_Revenue_Budget.csv', and 'backup_authorized_keys', target export directory '/home/ga/Documents/DecryptedExport', target report file '/home/ga/Documents/decommission_report.txt', and ground truth assets directory '/workspace/assets/sample_data'.
